packages.title: Pharaohs & Temples Trail
packages.description: Walk in the footsteps of ancient rulers across Cairo, Luxor, and Aswan. Includes Egyptologist-guided visits to Karnak, Valley of the Kings, and the Pyramids of Giza.

packages.title: Islamic Cairo & Coptic Heritage
packages.description: Discover Cairo's layered history — from the Hanging Church and Ben Ezra Synagogue to the stunning mosques of the Citadel and the narrow alleys of Khan el-Khalili.

packages.title: Alexandria Day Discovery
packages.description: A full-day immersion into the Mediterranean gem founded by Alexander the Great — catacombs, the modern Bibliotheca, and freshest seafood on the Corniche.

packages.title: Royal Egypt — 5-Star Grand Tour
packages.description: The ultimate luxury experience: private jets between cities, 5-star Nile cruise, personal Egyptologist, and exclusive after-hours access to monuments.

packages.title: Red Sea Luxury Wellness Retreat
packages.description: Unwind at an exclusive Red Sea resort with spa treatments, private beach, gourmet cuisine, and optional diving excursions in crystal-clear waters.

packages.title: Essential Egypt on a Shoestring
packages.description: See all the highlights without breaking the bank. Shared transport, clean hostels, and group tours covering Cairo, Luxor, and the Red Sea.

packages.title: Cairo Weekend Explorer
packages.description: A compact 2-day adventure through Cairo's greatest hits — perfect for layovers or short trips. Pyramids, museum, bazaar, and a Nile dinner cruise.

packages.title: Backpacker's Desert Night
packages.description: Camp under a billion stars in the White Desert. Includes 4x4 off-road adventure, Bedouin campfire dinner, and sunrise over surreal chalk formations.

packages.title: Classic Nile Voyage — Luxor to Aswan
packages.description: Sail the world's most iconic river aboard a 5-star cruise ship. Temple stops at Edfu, Kom Ombo, and Philae with onboard entertainment every evening.

packages.title: Dahabiya Traditional Sailing
packages.description: Experience the Nile as 19th-century travelers did — on a traditional wooden dahabiya. Intimate groups, wind-powered sailing, and stops at hidden-gem temples.

packages.title: Lake Nasser Cruise to Abu Simbel
packages.description: An extraordinary cruise on Lake Nasser — the vast reservoir behind the High Dam. Sail past Nubian landscapes to the monumental Abu Simbel temples.

packages.title: Egypt Family Discovery — Kids Love It!
packages.description: Designed for families with children 5–15. Interactive treasure hunts at pyramids, kid-friendly Nile felucca rides, and sandcastle contests on the Red Sea.

packages.title: Red Sea Family Beach Holiday
packages.description: Sun, sea, and snorkeling for the whole family. Kid-friendly resort with waterslides, glass-bottom boat rides, and optional camel treks in the desert.

banners.title: Early Bird Discount — Save 20%
banners.subtitle: Book 60 days ahead and unlock exclusive savings on any package

banners.title: Nile Cruise Season is Here
banners.subtitle: October–April is the perfect time to sail. Limited cabins available.

banners.title: Family Packages from $999
banners.subtitle: All-inclusive family holidays with activities kids will remember forever

banners.title: Luxury Red Sea Retreats
banners.subtitle: 5-star beachfront villas, private pools, and world-class diving

banners.title: Free Airport Transfer
banners.subtitle: Book any 5+ day package and get complimentary airport pickup & drop-off

banners.title: Abu Simbel — Don't Miss the Sun Festival
banners.subtitle: Twice a year, sunlight illuminates the inner sanctum. Next date: Feb 22

banners.title: Budget Egypt from $129/night
banners.subtitle: Affordable packages that don't sacrifice experience. See our value deals.

banners.title: Private Egyptologist Guides
banners.subtitle: Every tour includes a certified, English-speaking Egyptologist

banners.title: Hot Air Balloon Over Luxor
banners.subtitle: See the Valley of the Kings from above at sunrise — add to any Luxor package

banners.title: WhatsApp Instant Booking
banners.subtitle: Chat with our team and confirm your trip in minutes — no forms needed
